## 📦 Package Information

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Package Name** | `repo-name` |
| **GitHub URL** | https://github.com/user/repo |
| **Category** | `scrapers` / `web` / `cli` / `database` / `testing` / `utilities` / `messaging` / `storage` / `scheduling` / `concurrency` / `ai-ml` / `ui-frontend` |
| **Short Description** | _One sentence describing what it does_ |

---

## ✅ Submission Checklist

Please confirm all items below before submitting:

- [ ] The package is **written primarily in Go** (not a wrapper around another language)
- [ ] The repo includes a `go.mod` file (or is stdlib-compatible)
- [ ] The package is **actively maintained** (commits within last 12 months) OR historically significant/stable
- [ ] The license is **open-source and permissive** (MIT, Apache 2.0, BSD, etc.)
- [ ] The repo is **publicly accessible** on GitHub
- [ ] The repo has a **basic README** with usage documentation
- [ ] This package is **not already listed** in GoBook
- [ ] The entry follows **alphabetical order** within its category
- [ ] The description is **concise** (~120 chars max) and **neutral** (no marketing fluff)

---
